headline: America’s greatest idea is still under threat
summary: America celebrated its 250th anniversary with global spectacles. Millions nationwide and worldwide participated in grand celebrations. Despite the festivities, a core American ideal reportedly faces ongoing threats.

headline: Five questions for Dr. Rubin, who’s armed with a mic and a bowtie
summary: Misinformation spreads easily, wasting expert time and resources. Dr. Zachary Rubin is highlighted as an expert fighting to inform the public with truth. The article features an interview with Dr. Rubin, known for his mic and bowtie.

headline: Former Xbox studios Double Fine and Compulsion will keep games after going indie
summary: Microsoft is spinning off four Xbox game studios in a restructuring. Double Fine Productions and Compulsion Games will go independent. Both studios will retain ownership of their existing game franchises and catalogs.

headline: I spy
summary: Hollywood has shaped public expectations for smart glasses, both positively and negatively. A Netflix show inadvertently reveals the major cultural problem of smart glasses: privacy. The article explores surveillance concerns and privacy issues related to current AI wearables.

headline: Get a Perlegear Full Motion TV Wall Mount for Up to 90" TVs With 135lb Capacity for Just $33
summary: A Perlegear Full Motion TV Wall Mount is available for $33. It supports TVs up to 90 inches and has a 135lb capacity. The mount is UL 2442 compliant, tested to support four times its advertised weight.

headline: The Tiny Aoostar Ryzen 7 Pro 6850H Mini PC with 24GB of DDR5 RAM and USB 4 Ports Drops Below $300
summary: The Aoostar Ryzen 7 Pro 6850H Mini PC is now available for under $300. It features 24GB of DDR5 RAM and multiple USB 4 ports. This compact, Mac Mini-sized PC offers versatility, including light gaming capabilities.

headline: 'We Need to Change Course' — Bethesda Boss Tells Staff the Company Must Focus on 'Our Strongest Franchises' as Xbox Layoffs Hit Hard
summary: The Bethesda boss announced a strategic shift for the company. Amidst widespread Xbox layoffs, Bethesda will now focus on its "strongest franchises." The move signals a change in course for the game development studio.

headline: Today’s Best Deals: Darksiders: Warmastered Edition for PS5, LEGO Eevee, and Pokémon TCG
summary: Major deals are available on Darksiders: Warmastered Edition for PS5. Savings include LEGO Eevee and Pokémon TCG sets. Additional offers feature a modular controller, ARC Raiders for PC, and an MTG x Avatar Beginner Box.

headline: Trump confirms he asked Fifa boss for review of US striker's ban
summary: Donald Trump confirmed he asked the FIFA boss to review a US striker's ban. He stated FIFA made the "right decision" to suspend Folarin Balogun's one-match ban. Trump added that without the suspension, it would have been a "big stain" on the World Cup.

headline: Buckingham Palace says Prince Harry will not stay there despite his team announcing he would
summary: Buckingham Palace confirmed Prince Harry will not be staying there. This contradicts an earlier announcement from his team. Royal sources indicate the Duke of Sussex missed a deadline to respond to an accommodation offer.

headline: Britain's Arthur Fery reaches Wimbledon quarter-finals in history-making match
summary: Britain's Arthur Fery has reached the Wimbledon quarter-finals. He achieved this feat by defeating Grigor Dimitrov in five sets. Fery makes history as the first British wildcard to reach a Grand Slam quarter-final.

headline: Consultants in England vote in favour of NHS strikes
summary: Consultants in England have voted in favor of strike action. The senior doctors are prepared to strike over the next 12 months. The vote provides a mandate for industrial action within the NHS.
